CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.name: Security group name; letters, digits, Chinese, -_. allowed; must start with a letter; length 1-65
CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.rules: List of rules to attach on creation, up to 20 per request
CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.rules.ethertype: Network type: IPv4 or IPv6 (default IPv4)
CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.rules.sourceIp: Source IP address, 'all' means any (ingress rules)
CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.rules.destIp: Destination IP address, 'all' means any (egress rules)
CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.rules.remoteIpSet: Remote IP address group (mutually exclusive with sourceIp/destIp and remoteIpGroup)
CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.rules.remoteIpGroup: Remote IP address family (mutually exclusive with sourceIp/destIp and remoteIpSet)
CreateEnterpriseSecurityGroup.tags: List of tags to attach on creation

ListEnterpriseSecurityGroups.maxKeys: Maximum results per page, up to 1000, default 1000
ListEnterpriseSecurityGroups.instanceId: Filter by instance ID; omit to list all

DeleteEnterpriseSecurityGroup.enterpriseSecurityGroupId: ID of the enterprise security group to delete

AuthorizeEnterpriseSecurityGroupRule.desc: Add rules to an enterprise security group, up to 20 per request
AuthorizeEnterpriseSecurityGroupRule.enterpriseSecurityGroupId: ID of the target enterprise security group
AuthorizeEnterpriseSecurityGroupRule.rules.ethertype: Network type: IPv4 or IPv6 (default IPv4)
AuthorizeEnterpriseSecurityGroupRule.rules.sourceIp: Source IP address, 'all' means any (ingress rules)
AuthorizeEnterpriseSecurityGroupRule.rules.destIp: Destination IP address, 'all' means any (egress rules)
AuthorizeEnterpriseSecurityGroupRule.rules.remoteIpSet: Remote IP address group (mutually exclusive with sourceIp/destIp and remoteIpGroup)
AuthorizeEnterpriseSecurityGroupRule.rules.remoteIpGroup: Remote IP address family (mutually exclusive with sourceIp/destIp and remoteIpSet)

UpdateEnterpriseSecurityGroupRule.desc: Update an enterprise security group rule
UpdateEnterpriseSecurityGroupRule.enterpriseSecurityGroupRuleId: ID of the rule to update
UpdateEnterpriseSecurityGroupRule.sourceIp: Source IP address (ingress; mutually exclusive with remoteIpSet and remoteIpGroup)
UpdateEnterpriseSecurityGroupRule.destIp: Destination IP address (egress; mutually exclusive with remoteIpSet and remoteIpGroup)
UpdateEnterpriseSecurityGroupRule.remoteIpSet: Remote IP address group (mutually exclusive with sourceIp/destIp and remoteIpGroup)
UpdateEnterpriseSecurityGroupRule.remoteIpGroup: Remote IP address family (mutually exclusive with sourceIp/destIp and remoteIpSet)

DeleteEnterpriseSecurityGroupRule.desc: Delete an enterprise security group rule
DeleteEnterpriseSecurityGroupRule.enterpriseSecurityGroupRuleId: ID of the rule to delete
